meta.name: template-inspect-implement-verify
meta.description: TEMPLATE (pattern, C-shaped): inspect the code, implement against the plan, verify the result. Rename meta.name, then replace every <placeholder>.
meta.whenToUse: A change that should be planned from real code, applied, and independently checked

args.targetPath: string — <where in the repo, default src/>

steps.does: inspect the code under {targetPath} and produce a concrete plan for {task}: files to touch, approach, risks
implement {plan} exactly; note anything that had to deviate
verify {changes} against {plan}: <run the tests / exercise the affected flow>; report pass/fail with evidence

end.review: <e.g. verdict is pass with test output attached; deviations from plan are listed and acceptable>
